news.headline: German Greens' Habeck rejects debt brake reform to fulfill election promises.
German Economy Minister: In Germany, it would make sense to talk about security issues and Ukraine support, they should be separated from infrastructure talks.
ECB's President Lagarde: Trade, defence and climate issues can amplify or counteract the existing inflation forces.
German Economy Minister: EU counter-tariffs are logical and consistent
UK PM Starmer: I congratulate US President Trump and Ukrainian President Zelenskiy for Tuesday's remarkable breakthrough
German Economy Minister: The EU must not subjugate to the US government.
ECB's President Lagarde: We must pay particular attention to anchoring inflation expectations.
ECB's President Lagarde: I cannot provide forward guidance but must be clear about reaction function.
ECB's President Lagarde: Trade fragmentation is likely to lead to larger, more disruptive relative price changes.
ECB's President Lagarde: In case of large shocks, risk grows that inflation becomes more persistent.

ECB's President Lagarde: We cannot ensure that inflation will always be at 2% but must set policy so it converges to 2%.

ECB's Simkus: Direction of travel hasn't changed
21Shares reduces fees for Bitcoin Ethereum Core ETP ABBA, listing on Xetra exchange. Management fee lowered to 0.49% from 12 Mar 2025.
news.summary: On 12th March 2025, 21Shares AG reduced the management fee for the 21Shares Bitcoin Ethereum Core ETP (ABBA) to 0.49%. This fee adjustment comes with its listing on the Xetra exchange, showcasing 21Shares' dedication to enhancing cost-effectiveness in cryptocurrency investments. By lowering the fee, the company aims to make such investments more accessible to a wider investor base, solidifying its position as a key player in the cryptocurrency exchange traded products sector.

news.headline: Mercurity Fintech Holding Inc. partners with BitGo for institutional-grade custody services, emphasizing security, compliance, and protection as it expands digital asset offerings.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Mercurity Fintech Holding Inc. (MFH) revealed a strategic partnership with BitGo, a prominent player in institutional digital asset custody services. The purpose of this collaboration is to enhance MFH’s dedication to top-notch security measures, regulatory adherence, and safeguarding investor interests, particularly as the company broadens its range of digital asset services. This partnership signifies MFH’s ongoing efforts to prioritize security and compliance while expanding its digital asset portfolio. MFH trades on the Nasdaq under the symbol MFH.

news.headline: Europe markets rise on Ukraine optimism; Zealand Pharma jumps significantly.
Carv buys Recrubo, enhancing AI recruitment tech, aiming to serve "Recruiter of the future".
news.summary: In Amsterdam on March 12, 2025, Carv, a prominent AI recruitment technology company, revealed its acquisition of Recrubo, an inventive conversational AI platform focused on recruitment. This strategic move solidifies Carv's position as a leader in the industry. The launch of Carv's all-encompassing AI recruitment platform following the acquisition signifies a major development in the field.

news.headline: Earnings of multiple companies before the bell on March 12, 2025 - significant revenue projections and earnings.
news.summary: Several companies are set to report their earnings before the bell, including:- EHang Holdings (EH) with a projected loss of $0.07 per share on revenue of $23.36 million.- Hello Gr (MOMO) with expected earnings of $0.21 per share on revenue of $365.05 million.- Chicago Atlantic Real (REFI) estimated to report earnings of $0.56 per share on revenue of $14.19 million.- Waterdrop (WDH) to release earnings for its fourth quarter.- Upland Software (UPLD) projected to report earnings of $0.20 per share on revenue of $67.84 million.- VNET Gr (VNET) forecasted earnings of $0.03 per share on revenue of $284.88 million.- Vera Bradley (VRA) likely to report earnings of $0.06 per share on revenue of $107.94 million.- Sprinklr (CXM) estimated to report earnings of $0.07 per share on revenue of $200.59 million.- Arcos Dorados Holdings (ARCO) expected to report earnings of $0.21 per share on revenue of $1.15 billion.- Vivid Seats (SEAT) to release earnings of $0.06 per share on revenue of $194.15 million.- OptimizeRx (OPRX) estimated earnings of $0.27 per share on revenue of $30.36 million.- Navigator Holdings (NVGS) projected earnings of $0.32 per share on revenue of $120.87 million.- ABM Indus (ABM) with projected earnings of $0.78 per share on revenue of $2.09 billion.- Smith Douglas Homes (SDHC) likely to report earnings of $0.45 per share on revenue of $265.85 million. Other companies such as Amarin Corp (AMRN), ZIM Integrated Shipping (ZIM), Solo Brands (DTC), National Energy Services (NESR), iRobot (IRBT), Ondas Holdings (ONDS), and BingEx (FLX) are also expected to release their quarterly earnings.

news.headline: EU tariff retaliation is to include House Speaker Johnson's state - Official
Pepper Advantage appoints Vlad Botic as COO, Gary Stockley as CIO, and Kelli Riding as Director of UK Transformation.
news.summary: In London, Pepper Advantage, a prominent credit management firm operating in Europe and Asia, has appointed Vlad Botic as Group Chief Operating Officer (COO), Gary Stockley as Group Chief Information Officer (CIO), and Kelli Riding as Director of UK Transformation. These strategic appointments aim to enhance the firm's technology development, internal processes, and client experiences. The move is part of the company's efforts to drive innovation and expansion.

news.headline: The EU is to target GOP-led states with retaliatory tariffs - Official
Cato Networks introduces SASE-native LAN NGFW to eliminate 55-day patch gap, ensuring security and simplicity in firewall management.
news.summary: In a significant development, Cato Networks, a prominent SASE provider, revealed the successful integration of LAN and cloud firewalls, marking the closure of the 55-day patch gap. This convergence aims to streamline operations and enhance security by leveraging SASE principles. The announcement, made in London on March 12, 2025, declared the elimination of firewall patching requirements and addressed the vulnerabilities created by separate firewall systems globally.

news.headline: Volvo Car AB (publ.) releases Annual and Sustainability Report for 2024 on their Investors website in Sweden on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Volvo Car AB (publ.) has recently released its Annual and Sustainability Report for the year 2024 in Gothenburg, Sweden. The report covers various aspects of the company's performance and initiatives throughout the year. Interested individuals can access the report on the Investors website. Along with detailing the financial figures and significant events of 2024, the report also emphasizes Volvo Car AB's sustainability efforts and achievements during the same period. This publication provides key insights into the company's operations and outcomes, highlighting its commitment to transparency and responsible business practices.

news.headline: Cooler Master introduces new PC cases, cooling solutions, and power supplies offering enhanced cooling efficiency and performance-driven designs.
news.summary: Cooler Master, a top player in PC components and tech lifestyle solutions, unveiled a fresh lineup of products in Taipei, Taiwan. The range includes items aimed at boosting cooling efficiency, providing sleek form factors, and ensuring dependable power for varied computing requirements. Among the offerings are the compact Ncore 100 Air case and enhancements to the MasterLiquid and Hyper series. This move reflects Cooler Master's commitment to performance-oriented, user-centric designs. The company expressed enthusiasm about rolling out this comprehensive product range.

news.headline: Hello Group Inc. reported decrease in Q4 2024 net revenues to RMB2.6 billion ($361.2 million) with MAU on Tantan app at 10.8 million. For full year 2024, net revenues declined to RMB10.6 billion ($1.4 billion) with net income at RMB1 billion ($142.4 million). Hello Group declared a special cash dividend and announced a share repurchase program. Business outlook for Q1 2025 expects a revenue decrease of 6.3% to 2.4% year over year. Non-GAAP measures were used for financial results. Key numbers: Q4 2024 - Net revenues RMB2.6 billion, MAU 10.8 million; Full Year 2024 - Net revenues RMB10.6 billion, Net income RMB1 billion ($142.4 million); Cash dividend $0.30 per ADS, Share repurchase program up to $486.1 million.
news.summary: Hello Group Inc., a major player in China's online social networking, reported financial results for Q4 2024 and full year ending December 31, 2024:- Q4 2024 net revenues decreased by 12.2% to RMB2,636.5 million.- Q4 2024 net income attributable to Hello Group Inc. was RMB187.2 million, down from RMB452.5 million in Q4 2023.- Full-year 2024 net revenues decreased by 12.0% to RMB10,563.0 million.- Full-year 2024 net income attributable to Hello Group Inc. was RMB1,039.6 million, compared to RMB1,957.6 million in 2023.- Monthly Active Users on Tantan app decreased to 10.8 million in December 2024.- The company declared a special cash dividend of US$0.30 per ADS.- They have repurchased 43.5 million ADSs for US$264.0 million under their Share Repurchase Program.- For Q1 2025, they expect total net revenues between RMB2.4 billion to RMB2.5 billion.- Non-GAAP financial measures are used in this report to exclude share-based compensation and amortization of intangible assets.- A conference call on these results was scheduled for March 12, 2025.- Hello Group operates Momo, Tantan, and other apps in its portfolio striving for growth and innovation.

news.headline: Iran: Expecting to receive Trump's letter soon via an Arab country
HUAWEI eKit unveiled 20+ new products at Mobile World Congress 2025 to accelerate SME digital transformation.
news.summary: The HUAWEI eKit generated excitement at the Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2025 in Barcelona, Spain, with a remarkable product launch centered around the theme of "Explore New Horizons and Create a Better Future Together." The unveiling showcased more than 20 distribution products tailored for nine different...

news.headline: EU hits back at US tariffs with taxes on boats and bourbon, more to follow in escalating trade dispute.
news.summary: In response to the imposition of steel and aluminum tariffs by the United States, the European Union has retaliated by implementing tariffs on boats and bourbon. This move represents the EU's initial response, with further tariffs expected to be imposed in the future.

news.headline: Luxurious new homes in France at high prices are located in a Paris hotel.
Investment in Indian Stock Funds decreases amid market downturn, impacting sentiment.
BW Group, significant shareholder of Hafnia Limited, buys 396,795 shares at NOK 43.9984/share and 1,185,142 shares at USD 4.1502/share.
news.summary: In Singapore, BW Group Limited, the largest shareholder of Hafnia Limited and closely associated with a primary insider, recently acquired 396,795 shares of Hafnia Limited on 11 March 2025. The purchase took place on Oslo Børs at an average price of NOK 43.9984 per share. Additionally, on the same day, BW Group purchased 1,185,142 shares of the Company on the New York Stock Exchange at an average price of USD 4.1502 per share.

news.headline: Quectel introduces FCM363X Wi-Fi 6 & Bluetooth 5.3 module for high-performance short-range connectivity: ARM Cortex-M33, 1.2MB SDRAM, & 8MB flash memory.
news.summary: Quectel Wireless Solutions, a global IoT solutions provider, has introduced the FCM363X module in Nuremberg, Germany. This module showcases Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth Low Energy 5.3 capabilities for efficient short-range connectivity. Operating on 2.4GHz and 5GHz Wi-Fi bands, the FCM363X is equipped with a powerful ARM Cortex-M33 processor reaching speeds of up to 260MHz. Additionally, it includes 1.2MB SDRAM and 8MB flash memory, with the option for PSRAM expansion.

news.headline: Wiley and Pi School collaborate to enhance ESA's AI-driven Earth Virtual Expert with curated earth science research.
news.summary: In London, Wiley has announced a partnership with the European Space Agency to offer specialized earth science research for the development of the AI-driven Earth Virtual Expert. This collaboration aims to leverage Wiley's expertise in the field to enhance the capabilities of the ESA's virtual platform. The initiative underscores the importance of combining cutting-edge research with innovative technology to advance understanding of the Earth's systems.

news.headline: Quectel introduces 5 new GNSS antennas for diverse applications in Nuremburg, Germany. Antennas offer stable signal for cellular, Wi-Fi, GNSS & LPWAN networks.
news.summary: Quectel Wireless Solutions, a leading IoT solutions provider, has unveiled five new external terminal mount monopole antennas in Nuremburg, Germany. These antennas are specifically crafted to offer dependable and high-performing wireless connectivity for a wide range of applications. They boast superior RF capabilities that guarantee consistent signal reception and transmission across cellular, Wi-Fi, GNSS, and LPWAN networks. These antennas come with a user-friendly plug-and-play design and offer versatile installation options including magnetic, screw, or adhesive methods.

news.headline: Fastmarkets launches new aluminum pricing benchmarks for Mexico in March 2025, aiming to increase transparency in the market.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in London, Fastmarkets, a prominent commodities price reporting company, revealed the introduction of fresh aluminum pricing benchmarks for Mexico. Scheduled to commence in March 2025, these new benchmarks signify a significant development in Fastmarkets' portfolio.

news.headline: Clarivate released list of Top 100 Innovators 2025, with organizations generating $4.6 trillion in revenues, 4.4% of global economy.
news.summary: Clarivate Plc, a prominent provider of transformative intelligence, has released its 2025 list of the Top 100 organizations. These companies collectively generate a staggering $4.6 trillion USD in annual revenues, which accounts for 4.4% of the global economy. The list includes companies from various sectors and industries, showcasing their significant impact on the global market. This information was disclosed in London on March 12, 2025, marking a significant moment for the business world.

news.headline: German Chancellor Scholz: 30-day ceasefire is an important step towards fair peace in Ukraine.
Corona Cero partners with World Surf League for four years as official global beer sponsor, first time with a no-alcohol brand.
news.summary: Today in Lisbon, Portugal, Corona Cero, the renowned alcohol-free beer brand, has revealed a new four-year collaboration with the World Surf League (WSL), marking the first international partnership between the league and a non-alcoholic beer brand. This initiative expands on the existing eight-year partnership between Corona and WSL. The partnership aims to provide more options for both athletes and fans, integrating the relaxed vibes synonymous with surfing and the Corona brand. Following this announcement, excitement brews for the future collaborations between Corona Cero and WSL.

news.headline: EcoVadis unveils Sustainability Achievement Awards for 2025.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that there has been a 15% decrease in unemployment rates in the last quarter. This decline amounts to approximately 2.5 million individuals finding employment during this period. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 14 million. Furthermore, the report highlighted a 5% increase in job creation, with approximately 1.8 million new jobs generated in various sectors. The labor force participation rate has also increased by 2%, indicating a growing number of individuals entering the workforce. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a 3% growth, reaching $25.50. These statistics reflect a positive trend in the country's job market, showcasing an improvement in employment opportunities and economic growth.

news.headline: Etex overcomes market hurdles, continues strong performance in 2014, focusing on future growth.
First International Bank of Israel (TASE: FIBI) reports strong growth and profitability in Q4 2024. Tel Aviv, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel - In a statement released on March 12, 2025, First International Bank of Israel (TASE: FIBI), a leading banking group in Israel, disclosed its performance for the final quarter of the year. The bank reported a significant increase in both revenue and profit, showcasing a continuation of its growth trajectory. Despite this expansion, First International Bank of Israel emphasized its unwavering commitment to maintaining financial stability.

news.headline: Spanish Retail Sales SA YoY Actual 2.2% (Forecast 3.8%, Previous 4.0%)
VEXI Villages debuts Spider Tanks NFT Viewer, enhancing user experience with a handy viewer button for easy access.
news.summary: VEXI Villages recently introduced a new feature to improve user experience, offering a dedicated viewer button for Spider Tanks NFTs. This enhancement allows players to conveniently view Spider Tanks NFTs on the platform.

news.headline: JA Solar signs 260MW distribution deal with Exel Solar in Mexico, strengthening market presence.
news.summary: A major player in the photovoltaic (PV) industry, JA Solar, recently inked a significant deal with Exel Solar, a top PV distributor in Mexico. The agreement entails the distribution of 260MW modules and was unveiled at the RE+ Mexico 2025 event. This partnership underscores JA Solar's position as a key player in the global PV market and highlights their commitment to expanding their presence in Mexico.

news.headline: Sungrow to deploy PowerTitan 2.0 BESS for Renewable Power Capital's 50MW/100MWh project in Finland for improved efficiency.
news.summary: Sungrow has been chosen to provide the PowerTitan 2.0 liquid-cooled energy storage system for the Kalanti BESS project in Finland. The project, with a capacity of 50MW/100MWh, is being developed by Renewable Power Capital. The PowerTitan 2.0 features advanced technology that improves temperature regulation and efficiency, making it a standout choice for this initiative.

news.headline: SERMATEC expands in Europe with 200MWh contract in Poland after successful KEY 2025 showcase in Italy.
news.summary: In Rimini, Italy on March 12, 2025, SERMATEC, a prominent energy storage provider, stood out at KEY - The Energy Transition Expo 2025. They exhibited their innovative C&I and utility-scale energy storage systems, leaving a significant impression at the event.

news.headline: Egypt negotiates to rent German LNG unit before summer, undisclosed price.
Melania Trump's official memecoin, once valued over $13 billion, is now worth $367 million, falling 95% from its high.
news.summary: The official cryptocurrency Melania (CRYPTO: MELANIA) experienced a sharp decline on Tuesday, with a decrease of over 4% in the last 24 hours. This led to a weekly loss of 15.81%. In contrast, the broader meme coin market saw a recovery with a 2.64% increase in total capitalization during the same period. Melania has fallen nearly 95% from its peak of $13.73 since its launch in January, resulting in a loss of $13 billion in value. Other meme coins experienced a relief rally, highlighting Melania's continued struggles.

news.headline: EU retaliates against US steel tariffs, imposing own tariffs on boats & bourbon. More to follow.
news.summary: In response to the American steel and aluminum tariffs, the European Union has imposed tariffs on boats and bourbon. The EU has indicated that more tariffs are likely to follow.
